title: WEC Energy Group About Us
note: Documents WEC's utility subsidiaries, customer counts, distribution infrastructure, generating capacity, and regulated Midwest footprint.

title: WEC Energy Group 2024 Form 10-K
note: Primary filing source for WEC's regulated electric and natural gas operations, ATC ownership, infrastructure assets, and financial statements.

title: WEC Energy Group Stock Price and Overview
note: Market data source used for approximate market capitalization and trailing PE ratio in the 2026 refresh window.

title: We Energies About Us
note: Customer-facing source for We Energies electric and natural gas service and WEC Energy Group subsidiary status.

title: Wisconsin Public Service About Us
note: Customer-facing source for Wisconsin Public Service's electric and natural gas service territory and WEC Energy Group subsidiary status.

title: About OpenADR
note: Explains OpenADR's standardized demand-response and distributed-energy messaging model for interoperable grid flexibility.

title: OpenLEADR - LF Energy
note: Documents OpenLEADR as a free and open-source implementation of the OpenADR protocol.

title: OpenEMS GitHub Repository
note: Primary repository source for OpenEMS architecture, licensing posture, activity, and distributed energy management capabilities.

title: OpenEMS Homepage
note: Project homepage describing OpenEMS as an open-source platform for energy management and distributed energy orchestration.

title: Emoncms GitHub Repository
note: Primary repository source for the open-source Emoncms energy data processing, logging, and visualization application.
